ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are relevant and attempt to balance the urgency with fairness, but could be more natural in tone.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: The response is consistent with persona expectations of a cautious merchant and maintains the character's voice, but lacks direct relevance to context.
